issue.title: Change health check to generate its URL
issue.body:
We have environment variables for where `gunicorn` is listening, so we should use those to generate the proper URL instead of using a hard-coded argument in the `Dockerfile`.

I'd suggest instead of an error, we should format a string as the URL instead. This preserves the ability to override the URL with an argument but uses the generated one by default.

https://github.com/meeb/tubesync/blob/33479e8e36a23320e2107e42e051b7c4b5264c99/tubesync/healthcheck.py#L38-L42

https://github.com/meeb/tubesync/blob/33479e8e36a23320e2107e42e051b7c4b5264c99/tubesync/tubesync/gunicorn.py#L19-L24

https://github.com/meeb/tubesync/blob/33479e8e36a23320e2107e42e051b7c4b5264c99/Dockerfile#L776-L778

outcome.label: skip_correct
outcome.detail: Skipped: competing PR #1447 open at vet time (verified live: #1447 merged=true).
